items.title: Clash of contrasts at the Chinnaswamy as RCB host GT
items.summary: The two sets of batters couldn't be more different from each other, but where RCB and GT are similar is in the ability of their fast-bowling packs
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
